utility_evaluation.REASONING: Required format has 5 top-level items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. Check each for full specification: - health_coverage: Requires physical and mental health insurance with costs. The plan provides physical_health and mental_health with plans and costs. It adds telemedicine, which is extra but fine. This item is fully specified. - property_coverage: Requires home/contents insurance with costs. The plan includes home_contents_insurance with plan and cost, plus extra services (security discount service, technology protection). Core requirement met; fully specified. - travel_coverage: Requires travel insurance with costs. The plan includes travel_insurance with cost, plus extras (24/7 assistance, business travel support). Core requirement met; fully specified. - additional_services: Requires any enhancement services with costs. Provided premium_insurance_membership with cost. Fully specified. - total_budget: Requires complete monthly/annual cost breakdown. Provided monthly cost before discount, discount, final consolidated monthly cost, and annual cost. Fully specified. All 5 items are present and include the required details.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: I identified each plan/service named in the final coverage plan and matched it to the exact item names in the ground-truth ratings. For health: LifeFirst Standard Plan appears under both physical and mental health, both rated 8. Telemedicine Services maps to Health Enhancement Services with rating 9. For property: LifeFirst Standard Coverage (home contents) is rated 8; Home Security System Discount maps to property_enhancement_services Home Security System Discount with rating 9; Technology Protection maps directly with rating 10. For travel: PrimeTravel Premium Plan is rated 10; 24/7 Travel Assistance is in travel_enhancement_services with rating 9; Business Travel Support is also in travel_enhancement_services with rating 10. Additional services: Premium Insurance Membership is in general_services with rating 10.
